subcodes.first_line: God hath indeed heard thy call and is fully aware of what hath befallen thee. Verily, He is the Truth, the All-Knowing, the Knower of things unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع الله ندائک و کان عالما بما ورد علیک و انه لهو الحق علام الغیوب لایعزب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of love
